description: Evaluation test set for the Multilingual RAG Assistant, based on test_document.pdf (Brindleton Bike Share Rider Handbook).

tests.question: What types of bikes are in the fleet?
How much does the annual membership cost?
What is the minimum age requirement to use the service?
When does the program suspend service?
What is the maximum charge for bike damage?
इस सेवा का उपयोग करने की न्यूनतम उम्र क्या है?
